---
title: "Formula for Vaccine Effectiveness"
id: "OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01-sec02-sp03"
section_id: "OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01-sec02"
session_id: "OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01"
toc: True
---











<!-- IMPORT_START -->

In any outbreak investigation, raw numbers alone are not enough. Public health analysis depends on interpreting data relative to population size and exposure.

## What Data Is Collected?

Typical outbreak datasets include:

- number of confirmed cases

- population at risk

- vaccination status

- timing of exposure

## Key Epidemiological Measures

**Attack Rate**

The proportion of individuals who develop disease in a population over a defined time period

**Relative Risk**

A comparison of the probability of disease between two groups

## Exploring the Dataset

**Table:** Table 1. Distribution of cases by vaccination status

[Open table source](../../resources/data/ve-data.csv)

## How to Read This Table

::: {.panel-tabset}
## Vaccinated
Fewer cases suggest protection, but must be interpreted relative to population size\

## Unvaccinated
Higher case counts indicate increased risk\

## Comparison
Risk must be calculated before meaningful comparison

:::
## Thinking Critically

::: {.callout-tip}
**Self-check:** Why can't we rely on case counts alone?

**Suggested answer**

Because groups may differ in size, so proportions must be used instead
:::

## Key Message

::: {.callout-important}
Epidemiological analysis depends on comparing proportions, not raw counts
:::

<!-- IMPORT_END -->
_Add your primary content here. Use headings, lists, and images as needed._

---

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01-sec02-sp02.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Relative Risk</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="../03-calculating-vaccine-effectiveness/index.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Calculating Vaccine Effectiveness</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
